title: Show metric series on combined champion timeline
description: Update the ScoreChampionVersionTimeline combined multi-score chart so it renders each score's available alignment and accuracy metric series, not just champion-change markers.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Updated the combined ScoreChampionVersionTimeline chart to render each score's available feedback/regression alignment and accuracy series on the shared timeline. Combined chart still has no tooltip and uses activeDot=false. Focused Jest test and dashboard typecheck passed.
